### 🔬 New Intelligence Added in v3

**Constitution date narrowed by RUT cohort analysis:**

On March 14, 2022, the Diario Oficial MODIFICATION section contained three SpA companies with RUTs strikingly close to our target:

| Company | RUT | Gap from target |
|---|---|---|
| YANGO CHILE SpA | 77.506.936-8 | ← 55,362 below |
| PURA SpA | 77.528.697-0 | ← 33,601 below |
| **Solar Araucano SpA** | **77.542.354-4** | **← 56 above** |

**Solar Araucano SpA (77.542.354-4) is only 56 RUT numbers above our target (77.542.298-K).** Both companies registered with SII at essentially the same moment — almost certainly during the same week in late January or early February 2022.

**Diario Oficial constitution search — 19 dates exhausted:**
The "Papelera Manquehue SpA" name was not found in the CONSTITUCIÓN section of any of the 19 Diario Oficial dates scanned from January 24 to April 4, 2022. Conclusion: **dequienes.cl's index has a gap for this specific entry.** The entry exists in the official Diario Oficial archive but is not indexed on dequienes.cl. Formal verification requires direct access to the 27th Notaría of Santiago or the Conservador de Bienes Raíces y Comercio.
